description_long: This is a single-story residential house with a broad, low-pitched hip roof covered in gray shingles. The exterior walls are finished in a light color, likely stucco or painted concrete, and the house sits on a rectangular plot with a green lawn and a paved driveway leading to a covered carport. Large windows and sliding glass doors are present along the main facade, providing ample natural light and a modern touch. The front entryway is sheltered by an extended roof and features a small porch area with supporting columns. The house has a simple, functional layout with a focus on horizontal lines and open outdoor space. The overall design is reminiscent of a contemporary ranch or bungalow style, emphasizing practicality and comfort.
description: A single-story house with a wide hip roof, light-colored walls, large windows, and a covered carport, set on a grassy plot with a paved driveway. The design is modern and functional, with a sheltered entryway and open outdoor space.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, covered carport, driveway, and large windows along the facade.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the extended roof, small porch area, and minimal window openings.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying sliding glass doors, additional windows, and the open backyard area.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a clear look at the driveway, carport, and vertical slat feature near the entry.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large windows and sliding glass doors
attribute_entryway_design: Sheltered main entry with a small porch, supporting columns, and an overhanging roof adjacent to a covered carport
